lawName: Employees' Provident Funds and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1952
overview: Provides provident fund, pension and insurance benefits to eligible employees and prescribes employer obligations relating to registration, contributions and statutory compliance.

definitions.definition: An establishment to which the Act applies in accordance with the Act and notifications.
An employee covered under the Act as applicable.
The person or organisation responsible for compliance under the Act.

rules.title: Review EPF Applicability
rules.description: Determine whether the establishment is required to obtain EPF registration based on applicable legal criteria.

citations.reference: Employees' Provident Funds and Miscellaneous Provisions Act, 1952

rules.title: Employer Registration
rules.description: Where applicable, complete employer registration with EPFO.

rules.title: Employee Enrollment
rules.description: Enroll eligible employees under the EPF scheme.

rules.title: Monthly Contributions
rules.description: Deposit employer and employee provident fund contributions within the prescribed timelines.

rules.title: Maintain EPF Records
rules.description: Maintain prescribed employee records and contribution records.

exceptions.title: Voluntary Coverage
exceptions.description: Certain establishments may seek voluntary coverage subject to applicable provisions.
